What do you like best?

The automated billing is seamless and saves hours every week

What do you dislike?

Customer support takes too long, sometimes 3 days to get a response. Also the mobile app crashes when checking in more than 20 students at once

What do you like best?

Replacing three separate tools with one platform was huge for our team

What do you dislike?

Pricing jumped 40% at renewal with barely any notice. No way to negotiate. Had to consider switching
